channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter, 18th May
item.description:
Aera is covered in litter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rouel Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement / Cycleway marking between Elmfield Road and Stockwell Close Bromley missing for SEVERAL YEARS and STILL not marked out., 18th May

item.title: Has been like this since friday, 18th May
item.description:
Needs cleaning as it's blowing all o we the estate this estate used to be clean and tidy what has happened to it?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rutland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car part dumped, 18th May
item.description:
Car drive shaft dumped in the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large bit of wood with nails and screws sticking out of it outside Block 22 Columbus Square bin sheet, 18th May
item.description:
Lady block 22 Columbus Square is complaining the two tripped over a bit of wood. There’s a rug here. Can you please remove it ASAP because the kids have been climbing on it?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornwallis Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area covered in Litter and waste, 18th May
item.description:
Area covered in Litter and waste get worse by the day
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farwig Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Log Dumped, 18th May
item.description:
There is a large part of a tree dumped in the middle of Grassmead Recreation Ground. Please can it be removed asap. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanton Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish, 18th May
item.description:

item.title: Area covered in Litter and waste, 18th May
item.description:
Area covered in Litter and waste and has been for some time, requires a clean up. Seems to be getting more cluttered with rubbish as the days pass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Mooreland Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug addicts in local cemetery, 18th May
item.description:
Drug addicts broke into the cemetery, two seen here, They distributed/took their drugs throughout the morning, others appeared, they stayed just over an hour. Most of the time was spent under the chapel arch and on the bench towards the London lane end of Warner Road. First appeared at 6:45 and left at 7:15. They are regulars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warner Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandon cars Grehan Mews SE14, 18th May
item.description:
Abandon cars blocking road and the fire exits for other properties.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grehan Mews, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 large bags of waste dumped in bush., 18th May
item.description:
2 large bags of waste dumped in bush, flytipping has taken place in the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Mooreland Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Large bag green waste, 18th May
